author: mugishomp
description: Customize Obsidian's editor width with a slider for a tailored editing experience.
name: Editor Width Slider

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🚀 **New Release - Version 1.0.5** 🚀

We are excited to announce a new release of the Obsidian Line Width Slider Plugin (Version 1.0.5) with two fantastic features that enhance your editing experience!

**Feature 1: YAML Integration for Custom Editor Width**
- You can now customize the editor width for individual notes by using the "editor-width" field in the YAML frontmatter of your notes. This feature allows you to have different line widths for different notes, giving you greater flexibility in your note-taking and editing experience.
- The README has been updated with instructions on how to use this feature. Customize your editor width to match the unique requirements of each note for improved productivity and readability.

**Feature 2: Reset Slider to Default Percentage**
- We've introduced a handy new feature that allows you to reset the slider to a default percentage value with a single click. To make it even more user-friendly, you can configure the default percentage value in the plugin settings.
- Click on the number next to the slider to reset it to your preferred default editor width. Personalize your default editor width for a more tailored editing experience.

These features were developed to provide you with greater control and customization options in Obsidian. We hope you find them valuable in your note-taking journey!

🛠️ **How to Upgrade:**
- To enjoy these new features, make sure to update your Obsidian Line Width Slider Plugin to the latest version (1.0.5).
- You can download the latest release from the [Releases](https://github.com/MugishoMp/obsidian-editor-width-slider/releases) page.

As always, your feedback is invaluable to us. If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for improvements, please don't hesitate to [create an issue](https://github.com/MugishoMp/obsidian-editor-width-slider/issues) on our GitHub repository.

Thank you for your continued support, and happy note-taking!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Editor Width Slider Plugin v1.0.0**

- Introducing the Editor Width Slider plugin!
- Customize the width of the Obsidian editor with a convenient slider in the status bar.
- Easily adjust the editor width to enhance your editing experience.
- Enjoy the flexibility of fine-tuning the editor width to suit your preferences.
- Get started with this initial version of the plugin and unlock a new level of customization in Obsidian.
